sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65735" key="meionektiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειονεκτ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n65735.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disposed to take too little</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλεονεκτικός</foreign>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
